blog_title: 500 T-Shirts Embroidery Cost ₹25000 — Single vs Double Head Machine Price Breakdown India
caption:
₹25,000 for 500 tees embroidery — too high? 🧵

Customer used single head machine. 7-8 min per piece = 8 full days. Double head does both simultaneously — half the time, half the cost.

Single head: ₹50/piece. Double head: ₹35-38/piece.

For 500+ orders, always ask how many heads they have before you negotiate.

Save this if you're running a printing business 👇
